message:
refactor(html_export): Add structured logging and improve encryption

Enhances the HTML export module with observability and reliability:

encryption.rs:
- Add tracing spans for encrypt/decrypt operations
- Log payload sizes, iteration counts, durations
- Warn on validation failures for debugging

renderer.rs:
- Improve message rendering performance
- Better code block handling

filename.rs:
- Refine auto-generated filename logic

template.rs:
- Improve HTML structure and accessibility

styles.rs / scripts.rs:
- Minor CSS and JS refinements

These changes make HTML export more debuggable in production.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
